item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-06 - Today's Summary
item.description: The dominant pattern today is the sustained strength of AI agent frameworks and coding agents, which together account for 9 of the top projects and average daily star deltas of 865 and 847 respectively. Notably, 'mvanhorn/last30days-skill' and 'rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch' both in the agent framework category continue to attract steady attention, while 'github/copilot-sdk' maintains its position as a leading coding agent project. The MCP/tool calling category, though represented by only one project, shows the highest average weekly delta (9,942), suggesting concentrated developer interest in tool-use infrastructure. Cross-source confirmation is minimal, with only one Hacker News thread about Claude and rsync bugs overlapping with GitHub trends. The absence of major new launches or sudden spikes indicates a market consolidating around established agent and coding paradigms rather than shifting to new categories. Top projects: mvanhorn/last30days-skill, github/copilot-sdk, lfnovo/open-notebook, NVIDIA/cosmos, rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch, esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix, chopratejas/headroom, CopilotKit/CopilotKit, affaan-m/ECC, nexu-io/open-design, NousResearch/hermes-agent, HKUDS/nanobot Note: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。 Note: daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。 Note: Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。 Note: Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。 Note: Multi-source warning: arXiv collection failed: This operation was aborted

item.title: [sustained_hot] mvanhorn/last30days-skill (+616 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: An AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web, then synthesizes a grounded summary. Why it matters: With 28,083 stars, 2,386 forks, and a 24-hour delta of +814 stars, this project is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The recent v3 release and active commits (within 7 days) keep the momentum fresh. Developer insight: The project signals a shift toward agent-based research that bypasses traditional search engines. For AI developers, it shows the value of bridging walled-garden platforms and using engagement signals (upvotes, likes, market odds) as ranking signals. The modular skill architecture (via Agent Skills) is a pattern worth adopting. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] github/copilot-sdk (+285 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Multi-language SDK to embed GitHub Copilot's agent runtime into any application. Why it matters: The repo is sustaining high attention with 9,281 stars and a 24-hour delta of +463 stars, indicating strong ongoing interest. The acceleration ratio is low (1), which means the growth is steady rather than explosive, but the sustained_hot trend type confirms consistent daily engagement. This is not a flash-in-the-pan spike; it's a project that has built and maintained momentum over time. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward embedding agentic AI workflows directly into applications rather than relying on standalone chat interfaces. The SDK's BYOK support also indicates a trend toward flexibility in model provider choice, which could reduce vendor lock-in for AI features. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] lfnovo/open-notebook (+990 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Open-source, self-hosted alternative to Google Notebook LM with multi-model AI support, podcast generation, and privacy-first design. Why it matters: The project has 25,724 stars and gained 1,304 stars in the last 24 hours, indicating strong and sustained attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), suggesting steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. This consistent velocity makes it a reliable project to watch for developers interested in AI-powered note-taking and research tools. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward decentralized AI applications where users demand control over data and model selection. The multi-provider approach reduces dependency on single vendors and aligns with the growing 'local-first' AI movement. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] NVIDIA/cosmos (+730 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: World Models / Physical AI / Multimodal Foundation Models Description: NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools for building Physical AI in robotics, autonomous vehicles, and smart infrastructure. Why it matters: With 9,457 stars and a 24-hour delta of +682, Cosmos is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is low (1), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The recent release of Cosmos 3 (within 30 days) and active commits within 7 days keep the project top-of-mind for the AI community. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward unified multimodal models for Physical AI, reducing the need to combine separate vision, language, and action models. Developers should evaluate Cosmos for tasks like synthetic data generation, policy learning, and world simulation. Risk: Low
item.category: World Models / Physical AI / Multimodal Foundation Models

item.title: [sustained_hot] rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch (+521 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to autonomous swarms, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact. Why it matters: This repo is exploding in popularity with 29,007 stars, a 7-day delta of 7,907 stars, and a 24-hour delta of 521 stars. The three-day average star delta is 3,693, indicating massive sustained interest. The acceleration is 0.1 (medium), suggesting steady growth rather than a sudden spike. The high star count and fork ratio (4,743 forks) signal strong community validation and adoption. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward 'deep learning from scratch' as a mainstream developer skill. The demand for understanding AI fundamentals is surging, and this repo is capitalizing on that trend. It also shows that open-source curricula with practical outputs can compete with paid courses. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix (+480 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go for prefix-cache stability and low token costs. Why it matters: With 18,621 stars, a 24-hour delta of +480, and a 7-day average delta of 735.1, this project is experiencing sustained high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 0.7 indicates steady, organic interest rather than a sudden spike. It ranks in the top 2-3 in Agents, LLMs, and CLI categories on oosmetrics by velocity. Developer insight: The shift to Go and focus on prefix-cache stability signals a trend toward optimizing AI agent tooling for cost and performance at scale. Developers should watch for more agents adopting similar caching strategies. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] chopratejas/headroom (+1942 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Headroom compresses AI agent inputs (tool outputs, logs, RAG chunks) by 60-95% before they reach the LLM, preserving answer quality while slashing token costs. Why it matters: Headroom is on a massive growth tear: 14,883 total stars, with a 24-hour delta of 1,942 and a 3-day average of 3,307.5 stars per day. The acceleration ratio of 0.6 indicates sustained high velocity rather than a sudden spike, meaning the project has captured ongoing developer attention. This is a rare level of sustained interest for a utility library. Developer insight: Token compression is becoming a critical layer in the AI stack. Headroom's approach — local-first, reversible, multi-algorithm — signals a shift from simple prompt engineering to systematic context optimization. Developers should evaluate compression as a standard part of their LLM pipeline, especially for agentic workloads where context windows fill rapidly. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] CopilotKit/CopilotKit (+606 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: CopilotKit is a full-stack SDK for building agentic applications with Generative UI, shared state, and human-in-the-loop workflows across React, Angular, Vue, React Native, and chat platforms like Slack and Teams. Why it matters: CopilotKit is experiencing a sudden breakout with a 24-hour star delta of 606, a 7-day delta of 1010, and an acceleration ratio of 5.1 (high). The project has 32,854 stars and 4,210 forks, indicating massive community interest. The recent release and high commit activity suggest active development and growing adoption. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward multi-platform, agent-native UIs where the same agent backend can power web, mobile, and chat interfaces. Developers should consider adopting frameworks like CopilotKit to stay ahead in the agentic AI space, especially as enterprise adoption of AI agents accelerates. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] affaan-m/ECC (+1135 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: A harness-native operator system that optimizes AI agent performance across multiple coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) with skills, memory, security, and continuous learning. Why it matters: With 208K+ stars, a 24-hour star delta of 2,762, and a 7-day average of 1,647, this project is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.3 indicates steady momentum rather than a sudden spike, suggesting deep community adoption. The recent v2.0.0-rc.1 release (Apr 2026) adds operator workflows, a dashboard GUI, and Rust control-plane alpha, signaling active development and expanding scope. Developer insight: The rise of ECC signals a shift toward platform-level tooling for AI agents. Developers are moving beyond single-harness configs to cross-harness systems that manage skills, memory, and security centrally. This trend suggests that the next wave of AI developer tools will focus on orchestration and optimization rather than just agent capabilities. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+682 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Open Design is a local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design that turns your laptop into a design studio by letting coding agents generate prototypes, decks, images, and videos from a shared design system. Why it matters: With 59,651 stars, a 24h delta of +682, and a 7-day average of +575.7 stars/day, this project is sustaining massive organic attention. The acceleration ratio of 1.1 indicates steady, not explosive, growth — but the sheer volume (4,111 stars in 7 days) signals deep community resonance. The recent 0.9.0 release with a built-in Model Router removes setup friction, likely fueling the current momentum. Developer insight: This signals a shift from pixel-based design to code-based, agent-driven design. Developers should consider how their tools can expose MCP interfaces and support multiple agent backends to capture this growing workflow. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] NousResearch/hermes-agent (+2519 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: The agent that grows with you Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2519，总 stars 183,825，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] HKUDS/nanobot (+65 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Lightweight, open-source AI agent for your tools, chats, and workflows. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +65，总 stars 43,759，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
